cover: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Conditional Composite API v64'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Cut Salesforce API Calls by 40%'. Subtitle 'Server-side branching for chatty integrations'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Find existing Account with GET /query icon', 'Branch with condition=@{findAccount.totalSize} icon', 'Create or update in one composite call icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'CHATTY INTEGRATION' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'CONDITIONAL COMPOSITE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: await getAccount(); if (!id) await createAccount(); else await updateAccount(); await createContact(); right column green border '// GOOD' code: POST /services/data/v64.0/composite with condition '@{findAccount.totalSize} == 0'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'fewer round trips', 'server-side decisioning', 'better API limit posture'. Footer bar: 'Salesforce Conditional Composite API v64 reduce API calls'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Client-Side Branching vs Conditional Composite'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Stop Paying for Every IF Statement'. Subtitle 'Salesforce API v64.0 conditional execution'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Round trip per decision with network icon', 'API limit pressure with gauge icon', 'Retry complexity with warning icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: CLIENT BRANCHING' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: SERVER-SIDE CONDITIONS' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const a = await findAccount(extId); if (a) await patchAccount(a.Id); else await postAccount(); const c = await findContact(email); if (!c) await postContact(); right column green border '// GOOD' code: { referenceId: 'createAccount', condition: '@{findAccount.totalSize} == 0', method: 'POST', url: '/services/data/v64.0/sobjects/Account' }. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'one HTTP request', 'dependent subrequests', 'conditional skip logic'. Footer bar: 'Use Conditional Composite when branching is predictable'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Scale Guide for Conditional Composite API'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header '1K vs 100K vs 10M Records'. Subtitle 'Choose the right Salesforce integration pattern'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K records: latency cleanup with stopwatch icon', '100K records: API limit control with gauge icon', '10M records: use Bulk API/event architecture with database icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: COMPOSITE AS BULK LOADER' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: TRANSACTION WORKFLOW' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: for (const row of tenMillionRows) await postComposite(row); right column green border '// GOOD' code: await bulkApiLoad(accounts); await postComposite(exceptionWorkflow);. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Bulk API for volume', 'Composite for dependent branches', 'Events for async fanout'. Footer bar: 'Composite reduces calls, not data architecture decisions'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
